topic: key level trading framework over directional bias
summary: The video argues that higher timeframe key levels matter more than directional bias, positioning this as the core error many ICT-style traders make. It walks through a trading plan: identify higher timeframe key levels, wait for price to reach them, then use a lower timeframe for entry confirmation and trade to the next key level. Several chart examples across forex pairs (GBP/JPY, GBP/CAD, USD/JPY) are shown to illustrate the concept, with references to a paid community called Edge School.
